info.title: Recipe Storage Service API
info.description: API for storing and managing user recipes with Firebase authentication

tags.name: Recipe Storage
tags.description: APIs for storing and retrieving user recipes

tags.name: User Profiles
tags.description: APIs for accessing public user profile information

get.summary: Get a specific recipe by ID
get.description: Retrieves a recipe by its ID. User must own the recipe to access it. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own this recipe

put.description: Updates an existing recipe. User must own the recipe to update it. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own this recipe

delete.description: Deletes a recipe by its ID. User must own the recipe to delete it. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own this recipe

get.description: Retrieves all recipes owned by the authenticated user, ordered by creation date (newest first). Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

200.description: Recipes retrieved successfully (returns empty array if none found)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

post.description: Creates and stores a new recipe for the authenticated user. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

400.description: Invalid request body (missing required fields or validation errors)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

post.description: Bookmarks a recipe for the authenticated user. Idempotent – calling this when the recipe is already saved is a no-op. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

delete.description: Removes a recipe from the authenticated user's bookmarks. Idempotent – calling this when the recipe is not saved is a no-op. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

patch.description: Updates whether a recipe is public or private. User must own the recipe. Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

403.description: Forbidden - user does not own this recipe

get.description: Retrieves the public profile for a given user uid, including their display name, bio, avatar URL, and count of public recipes. No authentication required.
Retrieves a recipe by its ID without authentication. Returns 404 if the recipe does not exist or is not public.

404.description: Recipe not found or is not public

get.description: Returns the paginated list of recipes bookmarked by the authenticated user, ordered by save date (newest first). Requires Firebase authentication token in Authorization header.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Cursor token from a previous response (omit for first page)

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (size < 1, size > 100, or malformed pageToken)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing Firebase token

get.description: Retrieves recipes that have been marked as public, ordered by creation date (newest first). Supports cursor-based pagination via 'pageToken' and 'size' query parameters. No authentication required.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description: Cursor token from a previous response (omit for first page)

400.description: Invalid pagination parameters (size < 1, size > 100, or malformed pageToken)

CreateRecipeRequest.description: Request body for creating a new recipe

description.example: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, and pancetta

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe is shared with everyone

RecipeResponse.description: Recipe response with all recipe details including metadata

userId.description: Firebase user ID of the recipe owner

description.example: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, and pancetta

authorDisplayName.description: Display name of the recipe author (populated for public recipes)

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe is shared with everyone

isSavedByCurrentUser.description: Whether this recipe is saved/bookmarked by the current authenticated user

UpdateSharingRequest.description: Request to update recipe sharing status

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe should be public

recipes.description: List of recipes for the requested page

nextPageToken.description: Cursor token to pass as 'pageToken' to retrieve the next page, null when there are no more pages

Firebase Auth.description: Firebase ID Token (JWT). Obtain from Firebase Authentication and include in Authorization header.
Firebase Auth.name: Firebase Auth
